mapper.select: select g.id gid,g.gname,g.grprice,g.gpicture, c.id cid,c.shoppingnum,g.grprice*c.shoppingnum smallsum from carttable c,goodstable g where c.goodstable_id=g.id and busertable_id=#{busertable_id}
select g.id,g.gname,g.goprice,g.grprice,g.gpicture from goodstable g,focustable f where f.goodstable_id = g.id and busertable_id = #{userId}
